name: Deduction for Recoveries of Damages

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have received a compensatory amount included in gross income for a compensable injury and have 'unrecovered losses' (NOLs) specifically attributable to that injury that have not yet been used for tax benefit.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a deduction when a taxpayer receives a compensatory award or settlement for patent infringement, breach of contract, breach of fiduciary duty, or antitrust violations, effectively making the recovery tax-free to the extent of prior unrecovered losses.
